articles.title: China factory activity grows faster than expected in June on tech export demand - CNBC
articles.description: China's manufacturing engine held up this year as surging demand for artificial intelligence technology helped offset the drag from Middle East turmoil.
articles.content: China's manufacturing activity expanded faster than expected in June, with high-tech production climbing on demand tied to the global artificial-intelligence investment boom while real estate develop… [+3892 chars]

articles.author: Sarah Perez
articles.title: Watch out, Amazon: The Kobo eReader now has a Goodreads rival - TechCrunch
articles.description: Kobo users can now automatically sync their reading progress to StoryGraph, making it easier to track books, reading stats, and challenges without relying on Amazon’s Goodreads.
articles.content:
Another challenger to the Amazon Kindle-Goodreads book-tracking empire has emerged.
